response.overview: The domain of love is intimacy. It orients itself on the individual and the specific. At the same time, it is in fact less individual than one might assume. It touches on a powerful collective current that exists in the majority of mankind. Those who do not understand the language of love have not survived the evolutionary process. Prof. Dr. Karl Otto Hondrich, sociologists at Frankfurt/Main University, speaks on the occasion of the publication of his book, "Liebe in den Zeiten der Weltgeschichte" (Love in an Age of Global Society).
response.title: The Greatest Treasure of Evolution
